transcript.q:
# Welcome! 👋

Thank you so much for coming in today — it's great to meet you! I'm Alex, and I'll be conducting your interview for the Software Engineer position here. We're really excited to learn more about you and your experience.

Before we dive into the technical side of things, I'd love to start with something straightforward:

---

**Could you take a few minutes to tell me a little about yourself — your background, what you've been working on recently, and what drew you to apply for this role?**

Take your time, there's no rush!
